analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard 5th Edition spell formatting. The structure is complete, including level, school, casting time, range, components, duration, description, and class list.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description clearly details the effect, the saving throw type (Constitution), the damage dice, and the scaling progression (at 5th, 11th, and 17th levels).

mechanics.effect: Deals poison damage on a failed Constitution saving throw.
